Class Pet

java.lang.Object
Main.Pets.Pet
Direct Known Subclasses:
Chilly, Moji, Salad, SamplePet
public abstract class Pet extends Object
Represents the base class for all pets in the game. A pet stores its identity, images, skill state, movement target, speed, and the list of items it can spawn when using its skill.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Pet(int id, String name, String description)
    Creates a pet with the specified id, name, and description.

  • Constructor Details

    • Pet

      public Pet(int id, String name, String description)
      Creates a pet with the specified id, name, and description.
      Parameters:
      id - the pet identifier
      name - the pet name
      description - the pet description

  • Method Details

    • hasArrived

      public boolean hasArrived()
      Returns whether the pet has reached its target position.
      Returns:
      true if the pet is close enough to the target position, otherwise false

    • update

      public void update(double dt)
      Updates the pet position by moving it toward its target position.
      Parameters:
      dt - the time elapsed since the last update

    • updateIndex

      public void updateIndex()
      Updates the current item index used when the pet spawns an item. If random spin is enabled, the index is selected using the configured probability list. Otherwise, the index cycles through the spawn item list in order.

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the pet id.
      Returns:
      the pet id

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the pet name.
      Returns:
      the pet name

    • getBGid

      public String getBGid()
      Returns the background identifier of the pet.
      Returns:
      the background id

    • useSkill

      public abstract void useSkill()
      Activates the pet skill. Each subclass defines its own skill behavior.

    • getView

      public javafx.scene.image.ImageView getView()
      Returns the visual representation of the pet.
      Returns:
      the pet view

      Sets the visual representation of the pet.
      Parameters:

    • getCooldownTime

      public int getCooldownTime()
      Returns the cooldown time of the pet skill.
      Returns:
      the cooldown time in milliseconds

    • setCooldownTime

      public void setCooldownTime(int cooldownTime)
      Sets the cooldown time of the pet skill.
      Parameters:
      cooldownTime - the cooldown time in milliseconds

    • setUsingSkill

      public void setUsingSkill(boolean usingSkill)
      Sets whether the pet is currently using its skill.
      Parameters:
      usingSkill - true if the pet is using its skill, otherwise false

    • setSkillReady

      public void setSkillReady(boolean skillReady)
      Sets whether the pet skill is ready to be used.
      Parameters:
      skillReady - true if the skill is ready, otherwise false

      public boolean isUsingSkill()
      Returns whether the pet is currently using its skill.
      Returns:
      true if the pet is using its skill, otherwise false

    • isSkillReady

      public boolean isSkillReady()
      Returns whether the pet skill is ready.
